summary: Completed comprehensive testing of navbar simplification and services page redesign. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/services returns 7 services with correct structure and categories
Backend: GET /api/services/{slug} returns complete service detail for all tested services
Backend: GET /api/cases returns 4 case studies for related works section
Backend: GET /api/cases/{slug} returns case detail for navigation
Navbar: Desktop shows only Layanan, Portfolio (dropdown), Produk, Artikel, and Konsultasi button
Navbar: Removed menus (Kontak, Teknologi, Tim, Karier) NOT present in desktop navbar
Navbar: Portfolio dropdown shows 'All Projects' and 'Case Studies' options
Navbar: Mobile menu includes primary nav + secondary nav for discoverability
Services Page: Section-based layout with gradient visuals displayed correctly
Services Page: All 6 category filters present (Semua, Engineering, Platform, AI & Data, Design, Advisory)
Services Page: All 7 services displayed in section-based blocks
Services Page: Each service has functional 'Lihat Detail' button
Services Page: Filter functionality works correctly (tested Engineering and Platform filters)
Services Page: Service cards include category badge, title, summary, features list, and CTAs
Services Page: Bottom CTA section with consultation and assessment buttons present
Service Detail: Complete service information displayed with gradient hero section
Service Detail: Overview, Key Capabilities, and Use Cases sections present
Service Detail: 'Hasil Terkait' (Related Works) section displays 3 case studies
Service Detail: Case study cards have title, industry badge, summary, and link
Service Detail: Clicking case study card navigates to /cases/{slug} successfully
Service Detail: Sidebar CTAs for consultation and assessment functional
Service Detail: Back navigation and 'See all services' links work correctly
Service Detail: Consistent structure across different services (tested custom-software-erp and ai-data-automation)
Navigation: All page transitions work without errors
